name: Orange Cream Trifle
recipeIngredient: 2 Small Packages Instant Vanilla Pudding Mix
1/4 Cup Grand Marnier, Amaretto or Orange Juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the oranges and place orange slices on wax paper to freeze.
These will be used for garnish when serving.
2. In a large bowl, combine pudding mix, Dream Whip topping, heavy cream, milk, and almond extract on low speed.
Increase speed and beat until thick, about 5 minutes.
3. Line the bottom of a decorative 2-quart glass bowl with some ladyfingers, splitting them.
4. Drizzle the ladyfingers with liquid (Grand Marnier, Amaretto, or orange juice).
5. Spoon half of the fluffy mixture into the bowl.
6. Top with more ladyfingers and drizzle liquid on again.
7. Add the remaining creamed mixture.
8. Chill before serving.
9. Garnish with frozen orange slices.
This rewritten recipe maintains the original title, ingredients, and instructions while improving clarity and consistency.
